subject: MCore --refine_tiltmovies flag cannot find frame files
body:
Hi all,

I am writing to see if anyone have had similar issue while using MCore
refinement with --refine_tiltmovies flag (see below).

My project directory has the same structure as the apoferritin tutorial
dataset, MCore seems try to read TIF file from *warp_frameseries *folder,
but I only have xml files in  *warp_frameseries *and all my TIF files are in*
frames *folder.

It is a bit weird that -refine_tiltmovies flag worked fine with tutorial
dataset (the precalculated one from zenado), but didn't work on my own
dataset. The tutorial dataset also only has xml files in
*warp_frameseries * and all TIF files are in* frames *folder.

Any advice would be appreciated!

Best regards,
Cai






















*TIFFOpen:
/local/scratch/dataset1/tomostar/../warp_frameseries/b1g2_sq2_15_A2_ts_007_0000_-36.0.tif:
No such file or directory.TIFFOpen: Unhandled exception.
